narrative:
Keystone Local Sd (Lorain) school district has 7,819 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a clear Republican lean of 7.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.3% D−R vs -11.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
